---
title: "Monetary Spillovers through Echange Rates"
author: "Tony De Amorim"
format: pdf
---

# Library Imports
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(tidyverse)

```

# Data Imports
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false



```
